# Westfield Buzz

## About
Westfield Buzz is a community-curated service directory and events hub for Westfield, New Jersey. Residents recommend trusted local service providers (electricians, plumbers, landscapers, tutors, etc.) and share upcoming community events.

## Key Features
- **Service Directory**: Browse and search 85+ local service providers recommended by neighbors
- **Community Recommendations**: Real residents vouch for providers they've personally used
- **Events Calendar**: Upcoming community events, markets, festivals, and activities
- **Business Suggestions**: Community members can suggest new businesses to add

## Location
Westfield, NJ 07090 — a Great American Main Street community established in 1720.

## Categories
Electrician, Plumber, HVAC, Landscaper, House Cleaner, Handyman, Painter, Tutor, Contractor, Auto Mechanic

## Contact
Visit https://westfieldbuzz.com
